{{Quote|I can't be worrying about my brother running off with some intergalactic skank.|[[Mission Vao]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Lena''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived in the [[Lower City]] of the<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], spending most of her time with her boyfriend, [[Griff Vao]]. Griff, who was trying to survive with his sister, [[Mission Vao|Mission]], borrowed a large sum of [[Currency/Legends|money]] from Lena to pay for a series of get-rich quick schemes. None of the schemes worked and Lena finally left him.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lena first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'']].<ref name="KOTOR" />
